name: Drupal With Postgresql
tagline: Drupal is a free and open-source web content management system written in PHP and distributed under the GNU General Public License.
description:
Drupal is a free and open-source web content management system written in PHP and distributed under the GNU General Public License.

Docs: https://www.drupal.org/about?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  drupal:
    image: drupal:10-apache
    environment:
      - DB_HOST=postgres
      - DB_NAME=postgres
      - DB_USER=postgres
      - DB_PASSWORD=31b38a83fe034d1b9d26c83bf9d982c5
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: drupal_modules
        target: /var/www/html/modules
      - type: volume
        source: drupal_profiles
        target: /var/www/html/profiles
      - type: volume
        source: drupal_themes
        target: /var/www/html/themes
      - type: volume
        source: drupal_sites
        target: /var/www/html/sites
    depends_on:
      - postgres
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - curl -f http://localhost:80 || exit 1
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42027:80
  postgres:
    image: postgres:16
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_DB=postgres
      - POSTGRES_USER=postgres
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=31b38a83fe034d1b9d26c83bf9d982c5
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -U $${POSTGRES_USER:-liv3dcd7f71} -d $${POSTGRES_DB:-drupal_with_postgresql}
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 20
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  drupal_modules: null
  drupal_profiles: null
  drupal_themes: null
  drupal_sites: null
